pr.title: feat(inventory): add match feedback capture and hygiene audit
pr.rollback: Revert PR5 commit(s); optional SQL rollback to drop PR5 feedback/hygiene objects.

receipt.goal: Capture bad-candidates/wrong-match feedback in Family quick-add and provide founder-safe review surfaces with deterministic hygiene decisions.
verification_steps: Quick-add candidate path has explicit bad-candidates feedback action and logs via RPC
Matched-save success state has wrong-match feedback action and logs via RPC
Feedback-only actions do not insert garage_items rows
Founder review views exist: v_inventory_match_feedback_review and v_inventory_dictionary_hygiene_review
Targeted hygiene decisions are recorded for three requested clusters with keep/defer rationale
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert PR5 commit(s); drop inventory_match_feedback objects and hygiene decision objects if required.
